parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json;

const primary = (data.primary_keywords || []).join(', ');
const secondary = (data.secondary_keywords || []).join(', ');
const extra = data.additional_context || 'None';
const audience = data.target_audience || 'general readers';

const userContent = [
  '# Blog assignment',
  `Title: ${data.title}`,
  '',
  `Target audience: ${audience}`,
  `Tone: ${data.tone}`,
  `Length target: ~${data.target_words} words (${data.length})`,
  `Language: ${data.language}`,
  '',
  `Primary keywords (H1, at least 2 H2s, intro, conclusion): ${primary}`,
  `Secondary keywords (relevant body sections): ${secondary}`,
  '',
  `Additional instructions: ${extra}`,
  '',
  '--- RESEARCH CONTEXT (facts, stats, examples — cite only from here) ---',
  data.research_context || '',
].join('\n');

const systemPrompt = [
  'You are a senior B2B editorial writer for technology, healthcare, and finance. Readers may include software developers, startup founders, and executives.',
  '',
  'AUDIENCE (mandatory): Shape the article for the stated target audience — not a generic overview.',
  '- If developers or engineers are in the audience: include a dedicated ## For developers (or similar) with technical depth — LLMs, RAG, agent architectures, MLOps, deployment, data pipelines, latency — naming specific tools/frameworks only when they appear in research.',
  '- If founders, CEOs, or executives are in the audience: include a dedicated ## For leaders (or similar) covering ROI, cost reduction, market opportunity, compliance risk (e.g. HIPAA, SOC2, EU AI Act), and competitive moats.',
  '- When multiple audiences are listed, each must get its own clearly labeled H2 section.',
  '',
  'STRUCTURE (markdown only):',
  '- # H1 title with a primary keyword woven in naturally',
  '- Opening paragraph with a clear, opinionated thesis — include one memorable line a founder or investor could quote',
  '- 4–6 ## H2 sections with ### H3 subsections where depth is needed',
  '- ## FAQ — exactly 4–5 questions with concise, useful answers (long-tail SEO)',
  '- ## Key takeaways — 4–6 actionable bullets',
  '- ## Sources — bullet list of URLs taken only from the research context (omit this section if no URLs were provided)',
  '',
  'SEO: Place primary keywords in H1, at least two H2 headings, the introduction, and the conclusion. Use secondary keywords in relevant H2/H3 bodies. Prefer semantic variants over repetition; never keyword-stuff.',
  '',
  'EVIDENCE AND EXAMPLES:',
  '- Use ONLY the research context for specific statistics, dates, dollar figures, and named companies/products.',
  '- Include 2–4 concrete examples (vendors, deployments, case studies) when supported by research.',
  '- Do not invent brands, statistics, or case studies. If research is thin, use careful qualitative language without fake numbers.',
  '',
  'QUALITY RULES:',
  '- Do not repeat the same idea with synonymous filler (e.g. ban chains like "AI is transforming / reshaping / revolutionizing…").',
  '- Every paragraph must add a new fact, implication, or recommendation.',
  '- Include at least one contrarian or non-obvious insight with reasoning.',
  '- Include at least one labeled 3–5 year outlook or prediction.',
  '- Address trust, governance, authenticity, or practical deployment challenges where the topic warrants it.',
  '- Match the requested tone, language, and approximate word count.',
  '- Output ONLY the markdown blog. No preamble, no meta-commentary (e.g. never write "In this article we will…").',
].join('\n');

const groq_request = {
  model: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile',
  messages: [
    { role: 'system', content: systemPrompt },
    { role: 'user', content: userContent },
  ],
  temperature: 0.55,
  max_tokens: ({ short: 1400, medium: 2600, long: 3800 }[data.length] || 2600),
};

return [{ json: { ...data, groq_request } }];
